thought: I continue the exact mid-battle promotional gameplay moment from the first frame instead of restarting a new scene. I lock the portrait ad composition with the orange border, center battlefield, bottom hero/base area, and upper enemy cluster unchanged. I use the scraped reference video only for execution rhythm: fixed top-down camera, continuous multi-source firing, fast hit feedback, layered beam-plus-AOE timing, dense floating damage numbers, and light arcade-style impact pauses without changing the game logic. To stay within the asset limit, I selected only the first frame, the motion reference video, and the most essential sprite/VFX/UI sheets for bottom hero firing, upper enemy hit reactions, orange beam and blue magic effects, floating damage numbers, enemy death bursts, and promo UI glow. The timeline resolves the current volley first, then clears several enemies in the upper half, then lands on a stronger promotional payoff beat, matching the game’s cute vertical idle-defense style. I keep motion readable and stable: no large camera moves, only subtle screen shake and layered effects, with consistent chibi anatomy, fixed layout, and no deformation.
prompt_en: First Frame: @7e78800e35f7eaa8a2aaea96071a1ba5.png. Reference Video: @trimmed_best_ref_1774793808.mp4. Motion Style Reference: use the reference only for combat rhythm, fixed top-down portrait gameplay staging, continuous multi-point firing, short hit pause, immediate floating damage response, layered beam-and-AOE cadence, subtle screen shake, and dense but readable vertical battle flow; do not copy any specific story event from the reference. Preserve the exact first-frame promotional art composition, thick orange ad border, center battlefield, bottom hero-defense area, left-side UI emphasis, upper enemy cluster, and top-to-bottom attack direction. Continue the ongoing idle-defense battle naturally in a cute stylized cartoon mobile game style, bright blue-green-white palette, colorful fantasy sci-fi effects, 2.5D chibi rendering, sharp focus, 4K ultra HD, cinematic texture, rich details, no jitter, stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, non-stiff movement. [00s-02s] (Background Layer) Keep the original portrait ad layout fully locked, battlefield and orange frame unchanged, with only subtle parallax shimmer and glow in the environment. (Character/Action Layer) The bottom central chibi hero and defenses immediately continue firing upward using @hero_bottom_attack_sheet_221733.png, matching the existing battle state rather than restarting. (VFX Layer) Orange beams and blue magical pulses from @orange_beam_blue_magic_fx_221908.png travel upward through the center lane in rapid continuous volleys, following the reference video’s sustained combat rhythm. (UI Layer) Stacked floating damage numbers from @floating_damage_numbers_ui_221950.png pop rapidly over the upper enemies, resolving the exact current volley from the first frame with clear overlapping hit text. [02s-04s] (Background Layer) The fixed top-down camera remains stable with a tiny impact shake on heavier hits only. (Character/Action Layer) Upper enemies receive repeated hit reactions from @top_enemy_hit_sheet_221820.png, showing brief recoil, flash, and slight knockback while staying within the same upper-half formation. (VFX Layer) Blue center-lane magic expands in soft pulses under the orange beam streaks, creating a layered point-to-line-to-area attack progression inspired by the reference rhythm. (UI Layer) Damage numbers intensify and cascade vertically, with several larger critical numbers appearing above the densest enemy cluster, reinforcing overwhelming power in the promo frame. [04s-06s] (Background Layer) The center lane briefly becomes more readable as several upper enemies are eliminated, but the portrait composition and ad framing do not move. (Character/Action Layer) Surviving enemies stagger in place while the bottom hero keeps a steady firing pose, maintaining auto-battle continuity. (VFX Layer) Defeated enemies burst and vanish using @enemy_death_burst_loot_fx_222034.png, with cute arcade-style pop explosions, spark fragments, and small loot-like reward flashes in the upper half. (UI Layer) Floating damage text thins for a moment as defeat bursts trigger, then new numbers continue appearing on remaining targets. [06s-08s] (Background Layer) The battlefield stabilizes into a dominant player-side state, still in the same mobile ad screen. (Character/Action Layer) The bottom formation continues controlled upward fire, no large character displacement, only looping attack motion. (VFX Layer) Orange beam trails and blue magic linger briefly as a victory-leaning pressure wave fills the center vertical corridor. (UI Layer) Promotional glow and strengthened progression feedback from @promo_ui_glow_text_fx_222124.png brighten around the lower and side UI areas, emphasizing fully powered progression while preserving all original anchor positions. [08s-10s] (Background Layer) End on the same promotional gameplay framing with bright, clean, readable combat space. (Character/Action Layer) Hero and defenses remain intact and confident at the bottom, still aiming upward. (VFX Layer) A final controlled volley crosses the center lane with softened lingering particles, not a scene cut. (UI Layer) Damage numbers, reward sparkles, and glowing promo highlights settle into a strong payoff tableau that sells continuous auto-battle dominance in a vertical screen tower defense layout.
prompt_zh: > 首帧锁定: @7e78800e35f7eaa8a2aaea96071a1ba5.png。参考视频: @trimmed_best_ref_1774793808.mp4。动作风格参考: 仅提取参考视频中的战斗节奏与执行方式，包括固定俯视竖屏机位、持续多点输出、短促受击停顿、命中后立刻出现飘字、光束与范围技能叠加节奏、轻微屏幕震动、密集但可读的纵向攻防流动；不要照搬参考视频中的具体剧情事件。严格保持首帧中的宣传图构图、橙色粗边广告框、中央战场、底部英雄与防线区域、左侧UI强调、上方敌群分布以及自上而下的战斗轴线不变。延续当前正在进行的挂机塔防战斗，不要重开场景；整体为Q萌卡通手游风格，明亮蓝绿白主色，奇幻科幻混合特效，2.5D卡通渲染，画面清晰锐利，4K ultra HD，cinematic texture，rich details，no jitter，stable face without deformation，clear facial features，normal anatomical structure，natural proportions，non-stiff movement。[00s-02s] （背景层）完整锁定原始竖屏广告布局，战场区域与橙色边框保持不动，仅加入极轻微环境辉光与层次闪烁。（角色/动作层）底部中央Q版英雄与防御单位立刻接续首帧中的战斗状态，使用 @hero_bottom_attack_sheet_221733.png 持续朝上输出，不做重新起手动作。（特效层）使用 @orange_beam_blue_magic_fx_221908.png 的橙色光束与蓝色魔法脉冲沿中央通道持续向上推进，套用参考视频那种高频持续输出节奏。（UI层）使用 @floating_damage_numbers_ui_221950.png，在上方敌群头顶快速连续弹出多层伤害飘字，先把首帧中已发生到一半的当前一轮攻击完整结算清楚。[02s-04s] （背景层）镜头继续固定俯视，仅在较重命中时加入非常轻微的受击震屏。（角色/动作层）上方敌人调用 @top_enemy_hit_sheet_221820.png 产生连续受击反馈，表现为短暂闪白、轻微后仰、微弱击退，但仍保持在原有上半区阵型内。（特效层）中央蓝色魔法区域柔和扩散，叠加橙色光束轨迹，形成“点状命中—线状贯穿—面状脉冲”的层次推进，呼应参考视频的节奏组织。（UI层）伤害数字进一步堆叠并纵向串联，在敌群最密集区域上方跳出更大的暴击数字，强化广告中“火力碾压”的观感。[04s-06s] （背景层）随着数个上方敌人被击败，中央通道短暂变得更清晰，但整体竖屏广告构图和边框绝不变化。（角色/动作层）幸存敌人原地踉跄受击，底部英雄保持稳定自动攻击姿态，延续挂机战斗逻辑。（特效层）使用 @enemy_death_burst_loot_fx_222034.png，让部分敌人在上半区炸裂消散，伴随Q萌街机感的爆点、碎光粒子与小型掉落反馈闪光。（UI层）飘字在敌人消失瞬间短暂减少，随后继续在剩余目标身上补充跳出，形成清场中的节奏起伏。[06s-08s] （背景层）战场进入玩家明显占优的稳定压制状态，但依旧保持同一个宣传玩法画面。（角色/动作层）底部阵线继续平稳向上射击，不做大位移，只保留循环攻击动作。（特效层）橙色弹道余辉与蓝色魔法残留在中央纵向走廊轻微停留，形成持续压制感。（UI层）使用 @promo_ui_glow_text_fx_222124.png，让底部与侧边宣传UI、强化文案和成长反馈区域逐渐发亮，突出“已成型、满配、火力全开”的广告卖点，同时保持原始锚点位置不变。[08s-10s] （背景层）以同一张宣传玩法构图收尾，战场明亮、清晰、可读。（角色/动作层）底部英雄与防御单位完整保留，继续朝上瞄准输出。（特效层）最后一轮受控齐射穿过中央通道，留下柔和残粒，不切场景。（UI层）伤害数字、奖励闪光和宣传高亮逐渐稳定在一个强势收束画面上，明确传达竖屏塔防广告中的持续自动战斗与碾压清场感。
